scope: Plan disableable rotation augmentation and rotation-consistency evaluation for geometry-first flow matching.

apply_to: coordinate_frame_origin when represented in active frame
reproducibility: record whether augmentation was enabled in config snapshot
include ablation id in summary artifacts

raw_flow_velocity_metric.name: rotation_velocity_equivariance_error
raw_flow_velocity_metric.definition: For sampled rotation R, compare v(Rx, Rpocket) to R v(x, pocket) with mean L2 error normalized by mean velocity norm.
requires: same pocket features after coordinate rotation

generated_coordinate_metric.name: rotation_coordinate_consistency_error
generated_coordinate_metric.definition: Generate from original and rotated inputs, align by applying R^-1 to rotated output, then compare coordinate RMSD and centroid offset deltas.

ablation_matrix.purpose: Test whether augmentation improves consistency without architecture changes.

architecture_boundary.explanation: Rotation augmentation and consistency metrics regularize/test behavior but do not make GeometryFlowMatchingHead or AtomPocketCrossAttentionVelocityHead exactly E(3)-equivariant.
architecture_boundary.future_equivariant_option: A future E(3)-equivariant velocity head must be separately configured, tested, and compared as a new architecture ablation.

claim_guardrails: Do not claim exact rotational equivariance from augmentation alone.
Report rotation consistency separately for raw_flow and constrained_flow.
Keep augmentation default-off and disableable for ablations.
